events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the observed condition — venting trapped pressure directly at face level — is a stop-work hazard, so `decision: fail`, `risk: critical`. The sequence violation is that the discharge path wasn't redirected away from personnel (and PPE/orientation wasn't verified) before cracking the vent valve, per standard manifold isolation/venting procedure. Corrective actions require halting work, redirecting the vent discharge, verifying isolation/zero-energy state, and re-venting safely before continuing teardown.
